title: iliamna grandiflora
intro: Iliamna grandiflora, also known as the largeflower iliamna or large-flowered iliamna, is a flowering plant in the cactus family that is native to the western parts of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Iliamna grandiflora include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Iliamna grandiflora typically involve infusions of the leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, salves, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
